goal: Fast entry with slippage tolerance for guaranteed fills - alternative to maker strategy for comparison testing.
note: This is the TAKER variant - kept for A/B testing against maker strategy. Use maker strategy as primary.

entry.comment: Instant buy at ask + slippage - nearly guaranteed fill but worse price

use_case: High volatility / thin orderbook where maker fills are unlikely. Test against maker strategy to compare fill rates vs profit per trade.
